{{Quote|I've never seen anything like it!|A rebel|<ref name="SW106">[[Star Wars (1977) 106|''Star Wars'' (1977) 106]]</ref>}}
The '''''Wayfarer''''' was a large boat-shaped star cruiser, commanded by Tof forces led by a [[Unidentified Tof Supreme|Supreme]] in the [[Battle of Zeltros]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].

==Characteristics==
The design of the ''Wayfarer'' was reminiscent of earlier styles, such as the ''[[Fairwind]]''. It seemed to be of the same design as its fellow [[Tof/Legends|Tof]] warship, the ''[[Merriweather]]'', though there were minor differences.

==History==
[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and a team of [[Hoojib/Legends|Hoojibs]] and [[Hiromi]] infiltrated the ''Wayfarer'' during the Battle of Zeltros to rescue the [[Zeltron/Legends|Zeltron]] aides [[Bahb]], [[Jahn]], [[Marruc]] and [[Rahuhl]], that the Tofs had mistaken for important [[Alliance of Free Planets|Alliance]] commanders. The rescue was successful and cemented the Zeltron commitment to the Alliance. Before escaping the vessel, Skywalker planted explosives in key areas of the vessel, leading to its eventual destruction.
